title: Product Shop (React)
description: A modern e-commerce product browsing application built with React, leveraging Context API for state management, React Router for navigation, and Axios for API integration.

title: React JS Learning Projects
description: A curated collection of React-based exercises and mini-projects demonstrating core concepts such as components, hooks, state management, and reusable UI design.

title: Contact Card Generator
description: A responsive web application that dynamically generates professional contact cards using React and Tailwind CSS with a focus on clean UI and user experience.

title: First React Webpage
description: An introductory project showcasing foundational skills in building responsive layouts using React and Tailwind CSS.

title: YouTube Premium Clone
description: A pixel-inspired frontend clone of the YouTube Premium landing page, focusing on layout structuring and modern CSS styling techniques.

title: Weather App
description: A lightweight weather application that fetches and displays real-time weather data using external APIs and JavaScript.

title: Weather Web App
description: A user-friendly weather web application featuring API integration and responsive UI for displaying forecast information.

title: Len-Den (Expense Tracker)
description: A simple expense tracking application designed to manage and monitor group financial transactions effectively.

title: AI Medical Diagnostic System
description: An AI-driven healthcare application developed in Python to assist in predicting medical conditions based on input data.

title: Group Expenses Tracker
description: A web-based solution for efficiently recording and managing shared expenses among multiple users.

title: Guess The Number Game
description: An interactive command-line game developed in Python that challenges users to guess a randomly generated number.

title: C++ Assignments
description: A compilation of C++ programming exercises covering fundamental concepts and problem-solving techniques.

title: Racing Game
description: A browser-based racing game developed using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript with basic game mechanics and animations.

title: Catch Me Game
description: An engaging web-based mini game that demonstrates interactive DOM manipulation and event handling in JavaScript.

title: Course Website
description: A basic educational website built with HTML and CSS, showcasing structured layout and styling fundamentals.
